last_cycle.summary: Q111 PASS: t_star_backdoor_detect_mock.py — two-stage backdoor detector. Clean t*=8.70, Poisoned t*=3.23. AUROC=1.0, separation=5.47 steps. GCBench metric #10 proposed (t*_norm). Non-overlapping clean/poisoned distributions — paper-ready.
